subject: feat(debug): instrument critical paths with debugLog
body:
Added debugLog calls to all critical operations:
- ExportButtons: all 4 export paths (single, all-pages, PDF, multi-platform)
  with start, success (file size), and error logging
- designStorage: all IndexedDB operations (open, save, load, list, delete,
  migration) with success and error logging
- useAdState: design save/load/delete, page add/duplicate/remove, migration
- ErrorBoundary: React crashes now logged (replaces console.error)
- usePWAInstall: install prompt capture, user choice, app installed
- usePWAUpdate: SW registration, update trigger
- MediaTab: sample image manifest fetch success/error

Tags: debug, instrumentation, observability
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch

title: instrument critical paths with debugLog
